changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE picking_line ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
picking_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
move_line_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
product_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
source_location_id BIGINT NOT NULL, destination_location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
lot_id BIGINT,
reserved_qty NUMERIC(16,6) NOT NULL, picked_qty NUMERIC(16,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
state VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'WAITING', -- WAITING / PICKED / PARTIAL / FAILED
scanned_barcode VARCHAR(100),
picked_at TIMESTAMP,
created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
CONSTRAINT fk_picking_line_picking FOREIGN KEY (picking_id) REFERENCES picking(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
CONSTRAINT fk_picking_line_move_line FOREIGN KEY (move_line_id) REFERENCES stock_move_line(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
CONSTRAINT chk_picking_line_state CHECK ( state IN ( 'WAITING', 'PICKED', 'PARTIAL', 'FAILED' ) ),
CONSTRAINT chk_reserved_qty CHECK (reserved_qty >= 0), CONSTRAINT chk_picked_qty CHECK (picked_qty >= 0), CONSTRAINT chk_picked_le_reserved CHECK (reserved_qty >= picked_qty ) );
